name: Ham Steak Cabbage Soup
recipeIngredient: 1/4 of a 2½ lb head of cabbage, diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Put V-8 juice and celery into a blender and blend until minced.
2. Combine the blended mixture with all other ingredients in a soup kettle.
3. Bring the soup to a boil.
4. Reduce heat to a gentle simmer and let it simmer covered for 2 hours or until the cabbage is tender.
5. Makes 6 to 8 servings. Leftovers can be frozen and thawed to use within a year. You may add a bit of hot sauce if desired. This soup is great to eat when it's cold outside!
